creator: gleb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 183664
Update sysutils/pefs-kmod to 2017-06-20

Could you please try pefs-kmod port patch attached or latest revision in github:
https://github.com/glk/pefs/commit/51772339c0d0768326c883b76922b032b4e86e04

Can you think of anything unusual about your configuration? I couldn't reproduce it locally.
